title: Purrfect Slide
description:
Purrfect Slide is a charming and cozy take on the classic match-3 puzzle genre. Whether you want to relax after a long day or chase massive high scores, these adorable bubbly felines are here to help you unwind!

Key Features:

• Cute & Bubbly Match-3 Gameplay: Match 3 or more adorable cats to pop them and score points! Features 7 colorful kitty types including Pink, Green, Yellow, Blue, Purple, Orange, and the rare Calico.

• Special Cats & Combos: Match 4 cats to create a powerful Line Cat that clears an entire row or column. Match 5 cats in a T or L shape to spawn a Bomb Cat for an explosive area-of-effect clear!

• Fever Mode: Build up your combo multiplier and enter Fever Mode! The screen pulses, the music distorts, and your score skyrockets as you pop cats in a frenzy.

• Procedural Cozy Music: Enjoy an endless, procedurally generated cozy soundtrack that perfectly matches the relaxing puzzle vibes.

• Achievement Hunter Friendly: Over 60 fully integrated Steam Achievements to unlock, ranging from score milestones to popping hundreds of your favorite colored cats!
description_short: A cute, bubbly, and cozy match-3 puzzle game! Slide adorable colorful cats, trigger massive chain reactions with Bomb and Line cats, and chase high scores in Fever Mode. Kick back, relax to procedural cozy music, and unlock over 60 achievements in this purr-fectly relaxing puzzle experience.
